# Allan Medeiros

> Senior Solutions Architect. Enterprise systems for banking and insurance: microservices on Kubernetes, cloud migration (Azure/AKS, GCP, AWS), integration architecture, and architectural controls for AI-assisted delivery. Fifteen years at IBM (IT Architect for the last five); currently Allianz Technology. Based in Porto, Portugal.

## Facts
- Role: Senior Solutions Architect
- Employers: Allianz Technology (present); IBM (15 years, IT Architect last five)
- Stack: Java, Spring Boot, Kubernetes, Azure/AKS, GCP, AWS, Jenkins, Docker
- Domains: insurance, banking, logistics
- Outcomes (Allianz platform / migration): ~25% lower operating cost; ~40% less downtime on migrated paths
- Research: Google Scholar (4 papers, ~46 citations); co-author IEEE ISC2 2017; FEUP MEng thesis on generative AI agents for requirements ambiguity
